tasks.subject: Task 0: Commit pre-existing pixi dep additions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Clear the dirty working tree (httpx/typer/rich/stamina/vermin adds in `pixi.toml` + regenerated `pixi.lock`) so later tasks can commit `pixi.toml` edits cleanly.

**Files:**
- Commit as-is: `pixi.toml`, `pixi.lock`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git status --porcelain -- pixi.toml pixi.lock` is empty after commit
- [ ] Commit contains ONLY those two files

**Verify:** `git status --porcelain -- pixi.toml pixi.lock` → no output

**Steps:** Confirm `git diff pixi.toml` shows only the 5 dep lines; `git add pixi.toml pixi.lock`; commit `chore(deps): add httpx, typer, rich, stamina, vermin`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pixi.toml", "pixi.lock"], "verifyCommand": "git status --porcelain -- pixi.toml pixi.lock", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pixi.toml/pixi.lock clean after commit", "commit contains only those two files"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Live-test gating — guard lockdown + module gates + pixi deselect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** No test under `tests/live/` runs during a plain `pixi run test`, enforced by a new lockdown test.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/test_live_gating_lockdown.py`
- Modify: `tests/live/test_wan_then_spandrel_warm_reuse_smoke.py` (add `import os` + `pytestmark` skipif on KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS)
- Modify: `tests/live/test_spandrel_realesrgan_x2_upscale_smoke.py` (same)
- Modify: `tests/live/test_c27_fake_util_endpoint.py` (add `# kinoforge:ci-safe — fast local fake, no network, no cloud spend.` after docstring)
- Modify: `pixi.toml:124-125` (`test = "python -m pytest -m 'not live'"`, `test-cov = "python -m pytest -m 'not live' --cov"`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Lockdown test fails BEFORE the gate fixes (3 ungated modules + missing task deselect), passes after
- [ ] `pixi run test --co -q tests/live/test_wan_then_spandrel_warm_reuse_smoke.py` selects 0 tests
- [ ] `KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1` collection still finds the smokes (collect-only — DO NOT run them, they spend money)
- [ ] `test-live` task unchanged

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/test_live_gating_lockdown.py -v` → 2 passed

**Steps:** Full code in plan doc Task 1. TDD: write lockdown test → red → apply gates/tag/toml edits → green → verify collection both ways → commit `test: gate live smokes out of default runs + live-gating lockdown`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_live_gating_lockdown.py", "tests/live/test_wan_then_spandrel_warm_reuse_smoke.py", "tests/live/test_spandrel_realesrgan_x2_upscale_smoke.py", "tests/live/test_c27_fake_util_endpoint.py", "pixi.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/test_live_gating_lockdown.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lockdown red before fixes, green after", "default test task deselects live", "KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 still collects smokes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AC7 exemption tags on the two flagged write sites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py::test_ac7_no_path_write_outside_store_and_sink` passes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py:2194` — `# kinoforge:public-write` inline on the `Path(out_path).write_bytes(body)` line + justification comment (user-requested `fetch --out` destination)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py:1854` — `# kinoforge:public-write` inline on `with os.fdopen(fd, "wb") as fobj:` + justification (pod-side upload spool, not operator host)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AC7 passes; all other lockdown tests still pass
- [ ] Both tags carry a one-line justification; inline tag on the call line (AST extent)

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py -q` → all passed

**Steps:** Confirm red (exactly these 2 sites) → add tags per plan-doc code → full lockdown file green → commit `fix(lockdown): public-write tags for fetch --out and pod-side upload spool`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AC7 green", "no other AC regressed", "justification comments present"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: flashvsr runtime tests — unconditional imageio stub
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The 4 `tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py` failures become collection-order-independent (stub must win even when real imageio was imported earlier in the suite).

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py:287-323` — in `stub_diffsynth` fixture, remove the `if "imageio.v3" not in sys.modules:` guard (dedent body) and set `.v3` on the parent stub (`imageio_parent = types.ModuleType("imageio"); imageio_parent.v3 = ii`). Full replacement code in plan doc Task 3.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Repro (real imageio.v3 pre-imported) red before with pyav ImportError, green after
- [ ] File still passes standalone

**Verify:** `pixi run python -c "import imageio.v3; import pytest; raise SystemExit(pytest.main(['tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py', '-q']))"` → all passed

**Steps:** Repro red → apply replacement → repro green → standalone green → commit `test(flashvsr): install imageio stub unconditionally, fix CI ordering`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -c \"import imageio.v3; import pytest; raise SystemExit(pytest.main(['tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_runtime.py', '-q']))\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repro red before / green after", "standalone still green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: test_server_upscale — patch LORAS_DIR into tmp_path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The 14 `tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upscale.py` CI errors stop depending on writable `/workspace` (`_startup` at `wan_t2v_server.py:1109` mkdirs `LORAS_DIR` = `/workspace/loras`).

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upscale.py:62` — in `fresh_server` fixture, after the `ARTIFACT_DIR` patch, add `monkeypatch.setattr(srv, "LORAS_DIR", tmp_path / "loras")`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Fixture patches BOTH dirs `_startup` mkdirs
- [ ] mkdir sweep of wan_t2v_server.py shows no other unpatched absolute mkdir in the startup path
- [ ] File green locally (final arbiter is CI in Task 8 — bucket is CI-only)

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upscale.py -q` → all passed

**Steps:** Add patch line → `rg -n "mkdir" src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/wan_t2v_server.py` sweep → run file green → commit `test(server-upscale): patch LORAS_DIR to tmp_path, unbreak GH runner`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upscale.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_server_upscale.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LORAS_DIR patched to tmp_path", "no unpatched absolute mkdir in startup path", "file green locally"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: warm-reuse scan test — stub /health preflight seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py::test_scan_surfaces_index_row_when_ledger_empty` passes; no MagicMock reaches `urllib.request`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py:59-66` — add to the `with (...)` block: `patch("kinoforge.cli._commands._health_preflight_ok", return_value=True)` with comment (production scan gained /health capability preflight at `_commands.py:1414`; this test covers index-row surfacing, not stage matching)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Red before (ValueError: unknown url type MagicMock), green after
- [ ] Patches the module-level seam, not urllib internals

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py -q` → all passed

**Steps:** Confirm red → add third patch per plan-doc code → green → commit `test(warm-reuse): stub /health preflight seam in ephemeral-index scan test`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/core/warm_reuse/test_scan_warm_candidates_ephemeral_index.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["red before / green after", "seam patch not urllib patch"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: render_provision embed tests — parse gzip+base64 format
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Both `tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision_embed.py` embed tests decode the current provision emit format (`echo '<b64-of-gzip>' | python3 -c "...gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode(...))..." > <target>`, see `src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py:123-130`) instead of the old `base64 -d` format.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision_embed.py:76-113` — add `import gzip`; add module-level helper `_decoded_blob_for(script, target) -> bytes | None` (full code in plan doc Task 6); replace both tests' parse loops with helper calls. Keep `assert target in script` and the on-disk fingerprint sanity check.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Both embed tests red before, green after; fingerprint checks retained through gzip.decompress(b64decode(...))
- [ ] Other 4 tests unaffected

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision_embed.py -q` → 6 passed

**Steps:** Confirm 2 FAILED → add gzip import + helper → rewrite both loops → 6 passed → commit `test(provision): parse gzip+base64 embed lines in render_provision tests`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision_embed.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision_embed.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2 embed tests green", "fingerprint checks retained", "6 passed total"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: example-config slug test — exclude grid YAMLs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The 9 `tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py` failures stop — `*.grid.yaml` files are grid-sweep specs consumed by the grid loader, not `load_config` (no top-level engine/models → pydantic ValidationError).

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py:26-31` — in `_collect_example_configs`, add filter `and not p.name.endswith(".grid.yaml")` with explanatory comment (full code in plan doc Task 7)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 9 grid params red before; zero `*.grid.yaml` params collected after; all remaining pass

**Verify:** `pixi run python -m pytest tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py -q` → all passed

**Steps:** Confirm 9 FAILED (all `.grid.yaml` params) → add glob filter → all passed, count drops by 9 → commit `test(configs): exclude *.grid.yaml from load_config slug parametrization`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m pytest tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero grid.yaml params", "all remaining pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Full local gate, push, confirm CI green
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Entire suite + lint + typecheck + pre-commit green locally; push; CI run on GitHub completes green on both matrix jobs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (final status entry)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pixi run test` → 0 failed, 0 errors (live tests deselected/skipped; fixture-gated read-only RunPod probes may run — pre-existing, must not create pods)
- [ ] `pixi run lint`, `pixi run typecheck`, `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` all green (conflict priority: tests > mypy > ruff)
- [ ] Pushed; CI conclusion `success` for ubuntu-latest AND macos-latest
- [ ] PROGRESS.md updated with spec/plan paths + green CI run id, committed and pushed

**Verify:** `gh run list --workflow ci.yml --branch main --limit 1` → `completed success`

**Steps:** `pixi run test` → lint/typecheck/pre-commit → `git push` → `gh run watch --exit-status "$(gh run list --workflow ci.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')"` → on failure `gh run view <id> --log-failed`, fix, repeat → update PROGRESS.md → commit `docs(progress): main CI back to green — 7 buckets fixed + live-gate lockdown` → push.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --workflow ci.yml --branch main --limit 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["local suite 0 failed 0 errors", "lint+typecheck+pre-commit green", "CI success both matrix jobs", "PROGRESS.md updated"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
